'''Repulsor balls''' were small, fast, and maneuverable [[Antigrav/Legends|antigravity]] spheres that were the primary armament of the [[Fromm Tower Droid]] which were owned by the crime syndicate [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]]. The spheres could outrun a speeding vehicle at speeds of over two hundred and fifty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. When within one [[Meter/Legends|meter]] of their target, the repulsor balls would detonate with devastating power.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Droids (video game)|''Star Wars: Droids'' video game]]
